description: Start a local iOS simulator Appium session against http://127.0.0.1:4723 using the first booted simulator or a named one.
when_to_use: User asks to start local iOS session
User asks to connect iOS simulator
User explicitly asks for local iOS execution (not cloud)
prerequisites: Xcode Simulator booted (or boot one before connecting)

first_booted_simulator.description: Attach to the first booted iOS simulator reported by xcrun simctl.

named_simulator.description: Select a simulator when several are booted; device_name matches a substring of the simulator name.

slot_prompts.device_name: If multiple simulators are booted, which simulator name should we use? Partial match is OK.
